owner.evidence: Release-current ML/statistics audit verified all five risk thresholds, zero threshold/monotonicity/anomaly-promotion violations, 42 exploratory-vs-balanced differences, Dixon-Coles shadow stress matrices, paired identical-candidate HALT review, disabled automatic promotion, exact pipeline hash, and 58,940 audited leaves. This PASS does not establish robustness or profitability.

replication_1.evidence: Release-current data/code replication produced two exact prediction rebuilds, verified 58,940 unique JSON leaves, 10,763 research-recommendation audit rows linked to research probabilities plus Dixon-Coles rho with zero production-probability leakage, all 547 paired candidates, 18 sensitivity-review leads, 756 odds/screenshot hashes, report/site parity, focused tests, and clean diff.

replication_2.evidence: Independent replication-2/statistics review verified byte-identical reconstruction, monotonic distinct risk thresholds, no HALT override, isolated Dixon-Coles shadow stress, valid paired identical-candidate review, correct research lineage, bilingual structural parity, and the exact-tree suite result of 92 passed with one expected live skip. Profitability, ROI, and CLV remain unvalidated.

editor.evidence: Release-current editor/UIUX audit verified 58,940/58,940 structural rows, prediction/metrics/site hashes, no stale audit count, localized risk selectors, BTTS yes/no, diagnostics and diagram terms, numeric novice risk explanations, research recommendations, mobile loading/error behavior, tooltip safety, and focused browser tests.
